name: ClawKit for WhisprAI (Legacy Package)
description: Legacy package. Please install @clawkit/clawkit-for-whisprai for ClawKit for WhisprAI.

whispraiUrl.description: WhisprAI app base URL. Environment fallback: WHISPRAI_URL.

relayUrl.description: WhisprAI outbound relay URL. Environment fallback: WHISPRAI_RELAY_URL.

relayToken.description: Secret token used to poll the WhisprAI relay. Environment fallback: WHISPRAI_RELAY_TOKEN.

inboundUrl.description: WhisprAI inbound result URL. Environment fallback: WHISPRAI_INBOUND_URL.

inboundSecret.description: Secret used when posting results back to WhisprAI. Environment fallback: WHISPRAI_INBOUND_SECRET.

agentId.description: OpenClaw agent id shown in WhisprAI. Environment fallback: WHISPRAI_AGENT_ID.

pollIntervalMs.description: Relay polling interval in milliseconds. Environment fallback: WHISPRAI_POLL_INTERVAL_MS.
